query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `shared_reports` (
  `id` INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  `tokenHash` VARCHAR(64) NOT NULL UNIQUE,
  `reportType` ENUM('single_deal', 'comparison') NOT NULL,
  `dealId` VARCHAR(64),
  `comparisonId` VARCHAR(64),
  `userId` INT NOT NULL,
  `expiresAt` BIGINT NOT NULL,
  `revokedAt` BIGINT,
  `viewCount` INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  `lastViewedAt` BIGINT,
  `createdAt` TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  INDEX `sr_token_hash_idx` (`tokenHash`),
  INDEX `sr_user_idx` (`userId`),
  INDEX `sr_deal_idx` (`dealId`),
  INDEX `sr_comp_idx` (`comparisonId`),
  FOREIGN KEY (`userId`) REFERENCES `users`(`id`) ON DELETE CASCADE
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `report_views` (
  `id` INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  `tokenHash` VARCHAR(64) NOT NULL,
  `viewerIp` VARCHAR(45) NOT NULL,
  `userAgent` TEXT,
  `viewedAt` BIGINT NOT NULL,
  INDEX `rv_token_hash_idx` (`tokenHash`),
  INDEX `rv_viewed_at_idx` (`viewedAt`)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `shared_reports` (
  `id` INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  `tokenHash` VARCHAR(64) NOT NULL UNIQUE,
  `reportType` ENUM('single_deal', 'comparison') NOT NULL,
  `dealId` VARCHAR(64),
  `comparisonId` VARCHAR(64),
  `userId` INT NOT NULL,
  `expiresAt` BIGINT NOT NULL,
  `revokedAt` BIGINT,
  `viewCount` INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  `lastViewedAt` BIGINT,
  `createdAt` TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  INDEX `sr_token_hash_idx` (`tokenHash`),
  INDEX `sr_user_idx` (`userId`),
  INDEX `sr_deal_idx` (`dealId`),
  INDEX `sr_comp_idx` (`comparisonId`),
  FOREIGN KEY (`userId`) REFERENCES `users`(`id`) ON DELETE CASCADE
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `report_views` (
  `id` INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  `tokenHash` VARCHAR(64) NOT NULL,
  `viewerIp` VARCHAR(45) NOT NULL,
  `userAgent` TEXT,
  `viewedAt` BIGINT NOT NULL,
